atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The right knee pain is related to running

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient experienced right knee pain for several years

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies a family history of arthritis

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has been running regularly, including 5k and marathon training

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals mild effusion in the right knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals tenderness to palpation on the outside of the right knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There are no signs of redness or swelling

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Pedal pulse is present and intact

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Knee range of motion is within normal limits with mild pain on extension

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: X-rays show no fracture or evidence of arthritis

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms and physical exam findings are consistent with a knee sprain secondary to overuse

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is no evidence of structural damage or arthritis

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes two doses of 500 mg acetaminophen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes two doses of 200 mg ibuprofen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes doses every 6 hours as needed for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders physical therapy for the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician schedules a follow-up appointment in two weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician advises the patient to limit running for two weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends focusing on low-impact activities like weight training.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends focusing on low-impact activities as recommended by the physical therapist.
